name: season-b2b-lab-pdf
description: Server-side Chromium PDF pipeline for the Season B2B guide (Netlify function).

comments.version-pinning: These two MUST stay version-compatible: @sparticuz/chromium ships a specific Chromium build and playwright-core must support it. If launch() fails with an executable/protocol error, align them (e.g. bump both together) — this is the #1 cause of serverless PDF failures.
comments.alternative: puppeteer-core works as a drop-in for playwright-core with @sparticuz/chromium if you prefer.
